title: Add pothole detection with 50-meter advance alert

requirements.summary: Extend the road detection algorithm to identify potholes on the road surface using visual analysis of road texture, depth discontinuities, and surface irregularities
acceptanceCriteria: Pothole detection is integrated into the existing roadDetection.ts module
Detection results include pothole locations with bounding boxes or polygons
Potholes are visually highlighted in detection result overlays

file_operations.description: Add pothole detection capability to the existing road detection algorithm. Implement visual analysis of road texture, depth discontinuities, and surface irregularities to identify potholes. Return pothole locations with bounding boxes/polygons in the detection results. Verify the camera component's usage instructions before implementing.

Extend DetectionResult interface to include pothole detection data with locations, bounding boxes, confidence scores, and estimated distances. Add PotholeDetection type with properties for position, size, severity, and distance estimation.

Add visual overlay rendering for detected potholes. Display bounding boxes or polygons highlighting pothole locations on the detection result images. Include pothole markers with severity indicators in the visualization tabs.

requirements.summary: Calculate estimated distance to detected potholes based on camera perspective, road geometry, and pixel position in the frame
acceptanceCriteria: Distance estimation uses perspective projection or similar technique
Each detected pothole includes an estimated distance in meters
Distance calculations are performed in real-time during detection

file_operations.description: Implement distance estimation logic using perspective projection based on camera geometry and pixel position. Calculate estimated distance in meters for each detected pothole using the vertical position in the frame and assumed road plane geometry. Integrate distance calculations into the pothole detection pipeline for real-time operation.
Add distance field to pothole detection data structure. Include estimated distance in meters as a required property for each detected pothole.

requirements.summary: Trigger audio and visual alerts when potholes are detected within 50 meters, displaying 'Potholes on road' warning message
acceptanceCriteria: Alert is triggered only when detected potholes are 50 meters or closer
Alert message displays 'Potholes on road' text prominently
Audio alert plays using the existing alert sound system
Alert integrates with DriverAlertPanel component for consistent UI

file_operations.description: Add pothole alert logic to trigger visual and audio warnings when potholes are detected within 50 meters. Display 'Potholes on road' warning message prominently. Integrate with existing alert throttling mechanism to prevent alert spam. Play audio alert using the existing sound system with appropriate risk level classification.
Pass pothole detection results with distance information to DriverAlertPanel. Trigger alerts when any pothole is detected within the 50-meter threshold during real-time camera processing.
Pass pothole detection results with distance information to DriverAlertPanel for uploaded images. Enable pothole alerts when processing static images.

requirements.summary: Add pothole detection results to the backend ObstacleEvent storage, including pothole type classification, location coordinates, and distance information
acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister supports storing pothole events with type, position, and distance
Frontend stores pothole detections using useQueries hooks
Pothole events are retrievable in SystemOverviewPanel statistics

file_operations.description: Add hook for storing pothole-specific events using the backend addPotholeSpecificEvent method. Map frontend pothole detection data to PotholeDetails structure including potholeType, distance_from_vehicle, severity, depth, size, location coordinates, and image_url. Include proper error handling and query invalidation. Verify the blob-storage component's usage instructions before implementing for handling pothole images.

Call the pothole storage hook when potholes are detected during live camera processing. Store pothole events with full classification data, distance, and captured frame images to backend using the addPotholeSpecificEvent method.
Call the pothole storage hook when potholes are detected in uploaded images. Store pothole events with full classification data, distance, and source images to backend.

requirements.summary: Display detected potholes in the MetricsPanel with count and closest distance information
acceptanceCriteria: MetricsPanel shows total pothole count in current frame
Distance to closest pothole is displayed when within 50 meters
Pothole metrics update in real-time during live camera detection

file_operations.description: Add pothole metrics section displaying total count of detected potholes in current frame. Show distance to closest pothole when any are detected within 50 meters. Update pothole metrics in real-time as detection results arrive. Include visual indicators for pothole severity if available.
Extend DetectionMetrics interface to include potholeCount and closestPotholeDistance fields for tracking pothole detection statistics.
Pass pothole detection metrics (count and closest distance) to MetricsPanel for real-time display during live camera processing.
Pass pothole detection metrics to MetricsPanel when processing uploaded images.
